blocks.content: Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

Throughout this journey, you have:

- Learned the value of understanding billing and usage to optimize observability costs
- Opened the Cost Management and Billing app and explored its tabs
- Identified which Grafana Cloud products drive your monthly costs
- Learned how billing is calculated for Grafana Cloud products
- Created usage alerts to monitor spend and prevent unexpected charges

---

### More to explore (optional)

Continue your cost management journey by exploring:

- [Analyze and reduce costs](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/cost-management-and-billing/analyze-costs/)
- [Attribute costs](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/cost-management-and-billing/cost-attributions/)
- [Adaptive Telemetry](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/adaptive-telemetry/)
